system.description:
Discipline: Waijia
Skill: Any Melee against Parry
Type: Normal
Qi: 4

The attacker pours all of her anger and rage into a heavy bladed weapon, twirls into her enemies and cuts off their heads. The attacker can unleash a spinning attack and twirl like a spinning top, striking out at everyone in a 10 feet radius per Rank of Waijia. Roll any Melee against Parry scores of all inside the affected area. How it affects people is based on the targets’ Ranks in Qi: TARGET’S RANK EFFECT 0 Decapitated and killed 1 Target takes 2 Wounds and is decapitated if killed 2 Target takes 1 Wound and loses a limb on a Total Success 3 Target takes 1 Wound 4 Target takes normal Damage 5 Target takes 1d10 Damage 6+ Target takes no Damage This ability can only be used Cathartically.

Spinning Steel was devised by the legendary swordswoman One Armed Fiery Demon. This can only be used safely by females and was an attempt to recreate one of the Techniques from the Merciless Willow manual. Men can learn the Technique and attempt to use it, but doing so incurs 5 Wounds and reduces Hardiness by one permanently (every time you use it). This is due to the difference in Qi flow through the body.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticTargetEffects: Resolve effect by target Qi table: possible decapitation, limb loss on Total Success, direct Wounds, normal Damage, 1d10 Damage, or no Damage
system.accessNotes: This can only be used safely by females and was an attempt to recreate one of the Techniques from the Merciless Willow manual.
system.requirementNotes: This can only be used safely by females and was an attempt to recreate one of the Techniques from the Merciless Willow manual. Can only be used Cathartically.
